## 🛡️ Standards Compliance Checklist
All items must be checked before work begins.

### Authoritative Standards
- [ ] Comment standards will be applied  
- [ ] Naming conventions will be applied  
- [ ] Logging/debug standards will be applied  
- [ ] Deterministic ordering will be ensured  
- [ ] Rebuild‑safe behavior will be ensured  
- [ ] Obsolete routines will be removed  
- [ ] Missing logic will be merged  
- [ ] Cross‑routine calls will be correct  
- [ ] Final authoritative form will be followed
